{{Enemy Infobox|Byrdonis|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Territorial|2}}
'''Byrdonis''' is an {{2|Elites|Elite}} found in the {{2|Overgrowth}}.

== Pattern ==
{{Intents|Byrdonis|2}}
Byrdonis alternates between its two moves in a fixed pattern:
# {{Int|Byrdonis|Swoop||2}}.
# {{Int|Byrdonis|Peck||2}}.
# Back to {{Int|Byrdonis|Swoop||2}}, and so on.

== Notes ==
* {{Int|Byrdonis|Peck||2}} hits 3 times, so each point of {{BD|Strength||2}} adds 3 extra damage total on Peck turns.

== Version History ==
* '''Early Access v0.103.0 (BETA) '''
** Nerfed '''Byrdonis''': HP reduced from 91(99)-94(99) to 81(90)-84(90)

* '''Early Access v0.100.0 (BETA)'''
** Buffed '''Byrdonis''': Swoop attack damage increased from 16(18) -> 17(19)

* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Byrdonis to the game.
